_notes.greeting_morning: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is user display name. Greeting phrases are gender-neutral in es-ES (días/tardes/noches agree with the noun, not the user).
_notes.notifications_new_singular: [PLURAL] ICU plural rules applied. es-ES: una notificación nueva / {count} notificaciones nuevas.
_notes.notifications_new_plural: [PLURAL] See notes on singular form above.

projects.empty_state_body: Crea tu primer proyecto y empieza a construir tu sonido.
projects.project_card_delete_confirm: ¿Eliminar «{project_name}»? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
projects.storage_upgrade_prompt: Estás usando el {percent} % de tu almacenamiento. {upgrade_link} para conseguir más.
projects.storage_almost_full: Almacenamiento casi lleno — mejora tu plan

_notes.project_card_bpm_label: BPM = Beats Per Minute. Universal abbreviation — kept as-is per ontology.
_notes.project_card_key_label: 'Tonalidad' is the standard musical key term in es-ES.
_notes.project_card_tracks_singular: [PLURAL] {count} = integer. ICU plural rules applied. es-ES: 1 pista / {count} pistas.
_notes.project_card_last_edited: [PLACEHOLDER] {time_ago} is a relative time string generated at runtime.
_notes.project_card_delete_confirm: [PLACEHOLDER] {project_name} is user-generated content. Spanish typographic guillemets «» used per locale convention.
_notes.storage_upgrade_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {percent} is an integer; space before % per es-ES convention. {upgrade_link} is an inline hyperlink. [EXPANSION RISK]

_notes.template_singer_songwriter: Rendered as 'Cantautor' — standard es-ES term for singer-songwriter. [REVIEW] Gender: masculine default. Consider 'Cantautor/a' if the UI supports it.
_notes.template_film_score: 'Banda sonora' is the standard es-ES term for a film score (not a rating).
_notes.template_sound_design: Anglicism preferred per source notes. Term not confirmed in ontology. [REVIEW]

studio.ai_composition_hint: Genera melodías, progresiones de acordes y patrones de batería con la IA de ECHOCRAFT. Tú decides qué usas.

_notes.track_type_midi: MIDI is a technical acronym — kept as-is. 'track' localised as 'pista' per ontology.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saving: Trailing ellipsis (…) preserved — indicates loading state.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saved: Shortened to 'Todo guardado' to manage display space.
_notes.ai_composition_label: Rendered as 'Composición con IA' — matches pillar name used consistently across nav and studio.
_notes.ai_composition_hint: Agency cue ('Tú decides qué usas') added per es-ES market rule: AI transparency requires explicit control reference.
